message: Image generation failed. Story generation completed.
story: An opening image introduces a boys friendship in a world full of possibility. A sudden problem interrupts a boys friendship and creates a clear mission. A boys friendship follows a clue into a striking new place. A difficult choice tests a boys friendship when the journey becomes dangerous. A boys friendship discovers the courage needed to change the outcome. The adventure reaches a cinematic final moment with a boys friendship transformed. A quiet closing image shows what a boys friendship has protected or learned.
